sage_ono_kell:idle.greeting: Ono Kell is sitting in her hut, robes pooled around her. She does not rise. "Walker. The lattice has been carrying news of you for three days. Now you arrive."

nodes.npcText: "I sit with three questions today. Which would you like to sit with me about?"

playerOptions.text: Oracle Nesha in the hub. You've never spoken.
I'll come back when I have a question of my own.

nodes.npcText: "She and I have been studying the same shape from opposite walls. We have never read each other directly. I would like to."

playerOptions.text: Would you write to her, if I carried the letter?
What stops you from going yourself?

nodes.npcText: "Then sit. I will write while you wait. Drink the tea on the low table; you'll need it."
"The lattice does not let me leave easily. It has needed me here for forty years. It needs me here a while longer."
"The drift speaks to those who learn its grammar. I have learned the nouns. The verbs are still arriving. Would you like to learn a noun today?"
She raises one finger. The air shimmers around it briefly. "This is the shape of a thing that has happened twice. When you see it again, you will know." The shimmer fades.
Ono inclines her head. "The path back is the path in."

leader_voss_dren:idle.greeting: Voss Dren is standing in the drill yard, ash-skinned arms crossed. He nods you in. "Walker. The cohort is at rest. We can talk."

nodes.npcText: "Speak plain. The cohort is mine; the strategy is mine. I owe no one a softer version of either."

playerOptions.text: Calla Bren in the ruins. I know about the pact.
I'd like to drill with the cohort.

nodes.npcText: He does not flinch. "Who told you?"

playerOptions.text: I worked it out from public signals.

nodes.npcText: "Kit talks too much. Tell her so when you see her — gently. The pact is real. If you serve it well, we serve you well. If you betray it, both worlds will know your name."
"Then you're smarter than half my officers. Walker, the pact is real. I won't say more here. Find me at the lattice circle after dusk if you want the next layer."
"Fall in. Bring a blade you trust. We don't drill with the cohort's blades."
He turns back to the yard. "Walk on."

scout_emer_voss:idle.greeting: Emer Voss is squatting at the edge of the verge, reading the soil. "Walker. Make less noise next time. There's a thing through there listening to us."

nodes.npcText: "Stay or go. Either's fine. The thing won't come closer with you here."

playerOptions.text: Kiren Owl in the hub. You have the same print.
Tell me what the soil says.

nodes.npcText: Their eyes flick up. "Show me his sketch."
A long silence. "Yes. Exact match. We've been tracking the same creature from opposite sides. Take my sketches to him — every one. Tell him I'll meet him at the breach if he can find it."
"Damp at the north edge — wet boots passed twice. Pollen here that doesn't grow on our side of the verge. The thing came through last night. It went home an hour ago."
They nod, back to reading the soil. "Move quiet."
